rule_metadata.author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: WMI Reconnaissance (RedCanary Threat Detection Report)

rules.rule_text:
title: WMI Reconnaissance (RedCanary Threat Detection Report)
id: 4f2f005d-8755-4ff8-9086-179fc632a850
status: experimental
description: Detects the wmic reconnaissance activity. Part of the RedCanary 2023
  Threat Detection Report.
references:
- https://redcanary.com/threat-detection-report/techniques/windows-management-instrumentation/
author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
date: 2023/05/10
tags:
- attack.execution
- attack.t1047
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith: \wmic.exe
    CommandLine|contains:
    - \ldap
    - ntdomain
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown.
level: low
